title: Achoriphragma tianschanicum
intro: Achoriphragma tianschanicum, also known as Tianschan ginseng or Tian Shan ginseng, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fatigue, insomnia, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Achoriphragma tianschanicum include saponins, flavonoids, and polyphenols, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to promote vitality, improve cognitive function, and enhance overall well-being.
